---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.homepage}

::: {.sidebar}
![](files/img/Tapia_Theodore_main_large.jpg)

#### **Fedor V. Gerasimov**  

PhD student in Mathematics  
Rice University

**Email:** fg50 [at] rice [dot] edu  
**CV:** [PDF](files/Fedor_Gerasimov_CV.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}  
**GitHub:** [fedor-gerasimov-50](https://github.com/fedor-gerasimov-50){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}  
**LinkedIn:** [Fedor Gerasimov](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fedor-gerasimov-450352238/){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::

::: {.main-content}

## About

I am a second-year PhD student in Mathematics at Rice University, advised by [Gregory Chambers](https://profiles.rice.edu/faculty/gregory-chambers){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}.

My research interests are in discrete, convex, and computational geometry. I am especially interested in polyhedral geometry, unfoldings of convex polyhedra, and combinatorial/topological methods in geometry.

Before joining the Mathematics Department, I worked in the [CMOR Department](https://cmor.rice.edu/){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} at Rice University with [Matthias Heinkenschloss](https://profiles.rice.edu/faculty/matthias-heinkenschloss){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} on parameter identifiability and local solution manifolds in nonlinear least squares problems.

I received my B.Sc. in Applied Mathematics and Computer Science from the Moscow Institute of Physics and Technology in 2023. My undergraduate thesis, supervised by [Alexander Polyanskii](https://polyanskii.com/){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}, studied blocking and covering numbers of convex bodies.

## Research interests

- Discrete and convex geometry
- Polyhedral geometry and unfoldings of convex polyhedra
- Blocking and covering problems for convex bodies
- Combinatorial and topological methods in geometry
- Computational geometry

## Talks and Posters

- **Exploring Local Solution Manifolds of Nonlinear Least Squares Problems**  
Presented at: [RTG NASC 2024](https://rtg-nasc.rice.edu/news-and-events/annual-rtg-workshop){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}, Rice University; [SIAM TX/LA 2024 Section Annual Meeting](https://math.artsandsciences.baylor.edu/conferences/siam-conference){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}, Baylor University.  
[Poster](files/posters/LSQSolutionManifold.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} · [Abstract](files/posters/LSQSolutionManifold-abstract.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

:::

:::
